title: chelone digitalis
intro: Chelone digitalis, also known as Foxglove, is a biennial flowering plant native to Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Chelone digitalis lie in its ability to produce cardiac glycosides, specifically digoxin, which is used to treat various heart conditions such as atrial fibrillation and congestive heart failure. The health benefits of Chelone digitalis include its ability to improve cardiac function, reduce symptoms of heart failure, and slow heart rate. Chelone digitalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried leaves, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
